headline: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) a Moderate Buy, Say Analysts
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is among the ARK Invest Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks for 2026, with a stake value of over $456 million, based on the investment management firm’s 13F holdings for the fourth quarter of 2025. The stock remains on analysts’ radar and currently sports a Moderate Buy rating, with a slight downside […]
